title: Blood Craft
description: The mod will add a mysterious bloody biome with new structures and ores to the game
body:
The mod will add a mysterious bloody biome with new structures and ores to the game. There you will find such buildings as the old player house, a scarecrow and a bloody fountain... Explore the new ore available only here, create powerful armor with cool effects and enjoy the new music record!

❗NEW MUSIC RECORD YOU CAN FIND IN NEW STRUCTURE "OLD PLAYER HOUSE❗"

I HAVE GOOD NEWS!
I added new versions such as 1.21.1, 1.21.4
Now this and other mods will be supported on NeoForge!
